title: Rubius Cobblemon
description: Rubius Cobblemon is a polished, progression-focused Cobblemon modpack that turns Minecraft into a full Pokémon-style adventure. It features guided FTB Quests, expanded gyms and trainers, raid dens, legendaries, megas, and ZA content, alongside rich world g
body:
### What happen to 0.9

- during more playtime and realistic testing I concluded 0.9 was sadly not finished for release, there where multiple mods that caused issues after the update and those will be resolved first.



Shout out to the battleMaggots group for all the help with finding and helping me fix bugs.


## **Rubius Cobblemon**

**A rich, polished Pokémon + Minecraft survival experience.**

Rubius Cobblemon is built around the heart of **Cobblemon** and expanded with a carefully curated selection of mods, datapacks, and resource packs to create a complete Pokémon-style adventure inside Minecraft.  
Whether you’re here for battles, exploration, automation, or cozy survival, this pack is designed to feel **deep, guided, and alive**.

**Looking to make your cobblemon forever world? THIS is the pack for you!**

---

### 🎮 **Core Features**

- **Cobblemon Expanded**  
  A heavily enhanced Cobblemon experience featuring:
  - Raid Dens, Mass Outbreaks, Alphas, Shinies & Size Variations  
  - Gyms, Badges, Radical Trainers & Trainer Animations  
  - Mega Evolutions, Legends, ZA content & regional expansions  
  - Rideable Pokémon, Infinite Riding Stamina & PokéNav  
  - TMs, TRs, Move Inspectors, Pokédex (Cobblepedia), Smartphones, and more  

  Cobblemon is the focus — everything else supports and expands it.

---

- **Quests & Structured Progression (NEW)**  
  Integrated **FTB Quests** guide you through:
  - Catching, battling, training, and exploring  
  - Gyms, raids, legends, automation, and late-game goals  
  - Learning Cobblemon mechanics naturally, without hand-holding  

  Perfect for new players *and* long-term worlds.

---

- **Survival, RPG & Economy Systems**  
  - Earn and spend **CobbleDollars**  
  - Pokémon contests, paleontology, artifacts, and challenges  
  - Meaningful progression that rewards exploration and battles  

---

- **Exploration & World Generation**  
  Explore a massive, varied world powered by:
  - **Terralith**, **Towns & Towers**, **Structory**  
  - **YUNG’s** caves, dungeons, strongholds, temples, and monuments  
  - **Serene Seasons** for seasonal farming and atmosphere  

  Every biome and structure feels worth discovering.

---

- **Tech, Farming & Automation**  
  - **Create** fully integrated with Cobblemon (factories, potions, utilities)  
  - **Farmer’s Delight** ecosystem with seasonal and expanded cooking  
  - **Applied Energistics 2** for advanced storage and automation  

  Automation enhances adventure — it never replaces it.

---

- **Utility, Performance & QoL**  
  - Performance optimizations: Sodium, FerriteCore, ModernFix  
  - Navigation: Xaero’s Maps, Waystones, Compasses  
  - Storage & inventory management improvements  
  - Clean UI, better tooltips, animations, and menus  

  Despite its size, the pack is tuned for smooth gameplay.

---

- **Immersion, Visuals & Roleplay**  
  - Ambient effects: falling leaves, particle rain, sound physics  
  - Cosmetics: Accessories, 3D Skin Layers, Wavey Capes  
  - Multiplayer-ready with voice chat, teams, claims, and trading  
  - Optional shader support for enhanced visuals  

---

### 🎨 **Included Resource Packs**
Rubius Cobblemon ships with multiple **pre-configured resource packs** to enhance visuals, animations, and immersion, including support for:

- Cobblemon Midnight  
- Cobblemon Legends: Z-A  
- ZA-focused assets  
- Fresh Motion & Fresh Animations extensions  
- Trainer animation packs  
- UI, outline, and dark-mode enhancements  
- Themed Create & Cobblemon integrations  

Additional resource packs are included and can be enabled or disabled freely.

---

### 🧠 **Who Is This Pack For?**
- Players who want a **full Pokémon-style journey** in Minecraft  
- Long-term survival worlds and multiplayer servers  
- Builders, explorers, battlers, collectors, and roleplayers  
- Anyone who wants Cobblemon with **depth, direction, and polish**

---

### 🚀 **Ongoing Development**
Rubius Cobblemon is actively maintained and expanded.  
Expect future updates with new quests, balance changes, content additions, and compatibility improvements as Cobblemon evolves.

> Optional visual mods (shaders, extended render distance) are supported but not required.

### ⚠️ Name Disclaimer

This project is **not related to the streamer or YouTuber Rubius**.  
The name comes from a long-standing nickname and has been used in my projects for years.

For Spanish speakers:

>Este modpack no tiene ninguna relación con el streamer y creador de contenido Rubius.  

>El nombre «Rubius» era un apodo que me pusieron en broma y que he conservado en mis packs. 

>Además, por lo que he podido averiguar, el streamer utiliza a menudo el modpack Cobbleverse.

-----
### The pack is still in Beta until it goes to a 1.0 as long as there is a 0.X.X its beta this is still me refining the pack and this can cause some more of the major changes wihtin the pack (I will avoid big gamebreaking changes)
